titleStmt.title: SII 25.181: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 181. (A.R. No. 181 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
Kulōttuṅga III Year 25: 1202-03 A.D. (‘who was pleased to take Madurai, Iḻam and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’)

This incomplete inscription records the sale of a servant (āḷ-āvaṇam) by a certain Uḍaiyāṉ Namban Prasannadēvan of Śelgalūr in Iḍaikkā-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu executed in favour of the deity Ādichaṇḍēśvara of the temple of god Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.
It is a rare and interesting record which refers to the sale of human beings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum
pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī
kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5
Āvatu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttānam Uṭaiya
nāyanār yilāriRead ‘koyilāti’caṇṭeśva
ra tevaṟkku Āḷāvaṇañceytu
kuṭutten Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭu Iṭaikkā nāṭṭu celkalūruṭaiyā
n Uṭaiyāṉ nampān prasannadeva
nen Āḷāvaṇañceytu kalveThe rest of the record is lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
